name: Survive In Ankara
short_description: Welcome to Survive in Ankara! Are you ready to defeat the creatures that attack you, either with your friends or alone? I'm sure you can overcome these creatures with 5 customized characters. Join this adventure and destroy all creatures on 5 different maps
detailed_description:
Welcome to Survive in Ankara!

Survive in Ankara is a time-based survival game featuring minimalistic gameplay and roguelite elements. In a world where hell is empty and devils roam free, there's nowhere to run or hide. Your only goal is to survive as long as possible until death inevitably claims you. Collect gold during each run to purchase upgrades and aid future survivors.

Compatible with mouse, keyboard, controller, and touch screen.

5 Different Maps + 5 customized characters
